ham.subject: Your AcmeCloud Subscription is Renewing Soon – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello John,

We hope you’re enjoying your experience with AcmeCloud.
Your current subscription will renew automatically on 15‑May‑2026.
Please review the renewal details and verify your billing information to avoid any interruption.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCloud!

Best regards,
AcmeCloud Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Q3 Review Meeting – Confirm Your Attendance
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is a reminder that the mandatory Q3 Review meeting has been scheduled for 20‑May‑2026 at 10:00 AM CET.

Please join the meeting via Zoom/Teams using the link below:
<URL>

Attendance is required to discuss critical project updates and compliance matters. If you cannot attend, notify HR immediately.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Best,
Jane Smith
Head of Operations
